<xf:set var="$currencies" value="{$xf.app.em.getRepository('MJ\Credits:Currency').getCurrencies()}" />
<xf:checkboxrow label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_credits_long') }}"> <xf:foreach loop="$currencies" key="$currencyId" value="$currency"> <xf:option label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_less_than_x_y:', {'param1': $currency.title}) }}" name="user_criteria[mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_less][rule]" value="mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_less" selected="{{ $currency.isCriteriaSelected($criteria, 'less') }}"> <xf:numberbox name="user_criteria[mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_less][data][amount]" value="{{ $currency.getCriteriaValue($criteria, 'less') }}" /> </xf:option>
<xf:option label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_more_than_x_y:', {'param1': $currency.title}) }}" name="user_criteria[mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_more][rule]" value="mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_more" selected="{{ $currency.isCriteriaSelected($criteria, 'more') }}"> <xf:numberbox name="user_criteria[mjc_credits_currency_{$currencyId}_more][data][amount]" value="{{ $currency.getCriteriaValue($criteria, 'more') }}" /> </xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:checkboxrow>

<xf:set var="$statsBody"> <xf:numberboxrow name="options[batch]" value="28" min="1" label="{{ phrase('days_to_process_per_page') }}" />
<xf:checkboxrow> <xf:option name="options[delete]" value="1" label="{{ phrase('delete_existing_cached_data') }}" hint="{{ phrase('some_data_can_not_be_rebuilt') }}" /> </xf:checkboxrow> </xf:set> <xf:macro template="tools_rebuild" name="rebuild_job" arg-header="[BRC] {{ phrase('mjc_rebuild_daily_statistics') }}" arg-body="{$statsBody}" arg-job="MJ\Credits:Stats" />

'[' .phrase('mjc_deleted_event') . ']' : '' }} {{ date_time($transaction.transaction_date) }} {{ $transaction.User.username ?: phrase('unknown_user') }} {{ $transaction.TriggerUser.username ?: phrase('mjc_system') }} {$transaction.amount|mjc_currency($transaction.currency_id, true)} {{ $transaction.Currency.title }} {{ $transaction.description }} {{ bb_code($transaction.message, 'mjc_transaction', $transaction) }}

<xf:set var="$editHtml"><xf:trim> <xf:if is="$option.canEdit()"> <xf:macro template="option_macros" name="option_edit_link" arg-group="{$group}" arg-option="{$option}" /> </xf:if> </xf:trim></xf:set>
<xf:radiorow label="{$option.title}" hint="{$editHtml}" name="{$inputName}[enabled]"> <xf:explain>{$explainHtml}</xf:explain>
<xf:option label="{{ phrase('disabled') }}" value="0" selected="$option.option_value.enabled == '0'" />
<xf:option label="{{ phrase('default') }}" value="1" selected="$option.option_value.enabled == '1'"> <xf:hint>{{ phrase('mjc_credits_enable_navbar_default_explain') }}</xf:hint> </xf:option>
<xf:option label="{{ phrase('right') }}" value="2" selected="$option.option_value.enabled == '2'"> <xf:hint>{{ phrase('mjc_credits_enable_navbar_right_explain') }}</xf:hint> <xf:radio name="{$inputName}[right_position]" value="{{ $option.option_value.right_position ? $option.option_value.right_position : 'end' }}"> <xf:option label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_navbar_right_start') }}" value="start" /> <xf:option label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_navbar_right_middle') }}" value="middle" /> <xf:option label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_navbar_right_end') }}" value="end" /> </xf:radio> <xf:checkbox> <xf:option name="{$inputName}[right_text]" value="1" selected="$option.option_value.right_text"> {{ phrase('mjc_credits_enable_navbar_text') }} </xf:option> </xf:checkbox> </xf:option> <xf:html>{$listedHtml}</xf:html> </xf:radiorow>

<xf:selectrow label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_currency') }}" name="options[currency_id]" value="{{ $profile.options.currency_id ?: '' }}"> <xf:option value=""> </xf:option> <xf:options source="$currencies" /> </xf:selectrow>
<xf:numberboxrow label="{{ phrase('mjc_credits_exchange_rate') }}" name="options[exchange_rate]" value="{{ $profile.options.exchange_rate ?: 1 }}" min="0" step="any"> <xf:explain>{{ phrase('mjc_credits_exchange_rate_explain') }}</xf:explain> </xf:numberboxrow>

<hr class="formRowSep" />
<xf:selectrow name="options[currency_ids][]" value="{{ $options.currency_ids ?: 0 }}" multiple="multiple" size="7" label="{{ phrase('mjc_currency_limit') }}" explain="{{ phrase('mjc_only_balance_of_selected_currencies') }}">
<xf:option value="0">{{ phrase('mjc_all_currencies') }}</xf:option> <xf:foreach loop="$currencies" value="$currency"> <xf:option value="{$currency.currency_id}"> {$currency.title} </xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:selectrow>

<hr class="formRowSep" />
<xf:selectrow name="options[currency_ids][]" value="{{ $options.currency_ids ?: 0 }}" multiple="multiple" size="4" label="{{ phrase('mjc_currency_limit') }}" explain="{{ phrase('mjc_select_the_currency_that_the_user_wants_to_check_in_with') }}">
<xf:option value="0">{{ phrase('mjc_all_currencies') }}</xf:option> <xf:foreach loop="$currencies" value="$currency"> <xf:option value="{$currency.currency_id}"> {$currency.title} </xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:selectrow>

<hr class="formRowSep" />
<xf:numberboxrow name="options[limit]" value="{$options.limit}" min="1" label="{{ phrase('maximum_entries') }}" />
<xf:selectrow name="options[currency_ids][]" value="{{ $options.currency_ids ?: '' }}" multiple="multiple" size="7" label="{{ phrase('mjc_currency_currency_to_be_displayed') }}" explain="{{ phrase('mjc_only_richest_members_has_selected_currencies') }}">
<xf:option value="">{{ phrase('mjc_all_currencies') }}</xf:option> <xf:foreach loop="$currencies" value="$currency"> <xf:option value="{$currency.currency_id}"> {$currency.title} </xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:selectrow>

{{ phrase('mjc_alert_your_balance_debited_x_for_y', { 'amount': '' .$amountFormatted . '', 'event': $content.title }) }} {{ phrase('mjc_alert_your_balance_credited_x_for_y', { 'amount': '' .$amountFormatted . '', 'event': $content.title }) }}

{{ phrase('mjc_you_sent_x_to_y', { 'amount': '' .$amountFormatted . '', 'name': username_link($receiver) }) }} {{ phrase('mjc_x_sent_you_y', { 'amount': '' .$amountFormatted . '', 'name': username_link($sender) }) }}

function setShowLength(obj, maxlength, id) { var rem = maxlength - obj.value.length; var wid = id; if (rem < 0) { rem = 0; } document.getElementById(wid).innerHTML = "还可以输入" + rem + "个字"; } .red-packet { color: #fff; padding: 1em; height: 12em; margin: auto; max-width: 9em; overflow: hidden; position: relative; border-radius: 1em; background: #c40b00; } .red-packet header{ top: -2em; left: 0; right: 0; height: 5em; position: absolute; border-radius: 100%; background: #b00b00; } .red-packet main { margin-top: 1em; text-align: center; } h1 { font-size: 1em; margin: 3em 0; position: relative; } .red-packet .avatar.avatar--xxs { position: relative; top: 60px; } .red-packet .avatar.avatar--xxs img { left: 0; right: 0; margin: auto; max-width: 2.2em; position: absolute; border-radius: 100%; border: .1em solid #fff; } .red-packet .author { opacity: .7; top: -40px; position: relative; } .red-packet .open { outline: 0; width: 3em; height: 3em; color: #fff; border: none; display: block; font-size: 1em; cursor: pointer; margin: 1em auto; background: #ffb03a; border-radius: 100%; transition: background .3s, transform .3s; } .red-packet .open:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .red-packet .open:active { background: #eba534; } @keyframes red-packet{ from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } animation: red-packet .75s both cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55);

{{ phrase('mjc_receive_bonus_users') }}
{{ count($total) }}
{{ phrase('mjc_more_receive_users') }}

{{ phrase('mjc_users_who_purchase_charge_content') }}
{{ count($total) }}
{{ phrase('mjc_more_charge_purchasers') }}

{{ phrase('mjc_overview') }} {{ phrase('mjc_send_credits') }} {{ phrase('mjc_exchange') }} {{ phrase('mjc_fine') }}

{{ phrase('mjc_transactions') }}

{{ phrase('mjc_transactions') }}
{{ phrase('mjc_your_wallet') }} {$innerContent|raw}

{{ phrase('all_user_groups') }} {$userGroupTitle} {{ phrase('select_all') }} {$inner|raw} {$inner|raw}
{$userGroupTitle} {{ phrase('select_all') }}
{$inner|raw} {$inner|raw}

{{ phrase('confirm_payment_details') }}
{$purchase.cost|currency($purchase.currency)} {$cost|number($currency.decimal_places)}{$currency.suffix} {$currency.title}

<xf:macro name="message_macros_postbit" arg-user="!"> <xf:set var="$viewableCurrencies" value="{{ $xf.app.em.getRepository('MJ\Credits:Currency').getCurrencies(true) }}" />
<xf:if is="$viewableCurrencies"> <xf:foreach loop="$viewableCurrencies" value="$currency" if="(in_array($currency.currency_id,$xf.options.mjc_display_postbit))"> <dl class="pairs pairs--justified"> <dt title="{$currency.title}">{$currency.title}</dt> <dd>{$currency.prefix}{{ $currency.getValueFromUser($user) }}{$currency.suffix}</dd> </dl> </xf:foreach> </xf:if> </xf:macro>
<xf:macro name="credits_stat_pair" arg-user="!"> <xf:set var="$viewableCurrencies" value="{{ $xf.app.em.getRepository('MJ\Credits:Currency').getCurrencies(true) }}" />
<xf:if is="$viewableCurrencies"> <xf:foreach loop="$viewableCurrencies" value="$currency" if="(in_array($currency.currency_id,$xf.options.mjc_display_postbit))"> <dl class="pairs pairs--rows pairs--rows--centered fauxBlockLink"> <dt title="{$currency.title}">{$currency.title}</dt> <dd>{$currency.prefix}{{ $currency.getValueFromUser($user) }}{$currency.suffix}</dd> </dl> </xf:foreach> </xf:if> </xf:macro>

<xf:macro name="currency_select" arg-currencies="!" arg-currencyId="" arg-name="currency_id" arg-includeAny="{{ false }}" arg-row="{{ true }}" arg-label="{{ phrase('mjc_currency') }}"> <xf:if is="{{ count($currencies) == 1 }}"> <xf:set var="$select"> <xf:foreach loop="{{ $currencies }}" value="$currency"> {$currency.title} <xf:hiddenval name="{$name}">{$currency.currency_id}</xf:hiddenval> </xf:foreach> </xf:set> <xf:else /> <xf:set var="$select"> <xf:select name="{$name}" value="{$currencyId}"> <xf:if is="{$includeAny}"> <xf:option label="{{ phrase('any') }}" /> </xf:if> <xf:foreach loop="{{ $currencies }}" value="$currency"> <xf:option value="{$currency.currency_id}">{$currency.title}</xf:option> </xf:foreach> </xf:select> </xf:set> </xf:if>
<xf:if is="$row"> <xf:formrow rowtype="input" label="{$label}"> {$select|raw} </xf:formrow> <xf:else /> {$select|raw} </xf:if> </xf:macro>

<xf:numberboxrow name="options[fee]" value="{{ $event.options.fee + 0}}" min="0" label="{{ phrase('mjc_fee') }}" />
<xf:numberboxrow name="options[tax]" value="{{ $event.options.tax + 0}}" min="0" max="100" units="%" label="{{ phrase('mjc_tax') }}" />

<{$tag} {{ $nav.href ? 'href="' . $nav.href . '"' : '' }} class="p-navgroup-link p-navgroup-link--iconic p-navgroup-link--{$navId} js-badge--{$navId} badgeContainer{{ $nav.counter ? ' badgeContainer--highlighted' : '' }} {$nav.attributes.class}" data-badge="{$nav.counter|number}" {{ $nav.children ? 'data-xf-click="menu"' : '' }} {{ $shortcut !== false ? 'data-xf-key="' . $shortcut . '"' : '' }} data-menu-pos-ref="< .p-navgroup" aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true"> {{ $titleHtml !== null ? $titleHtml|raw : phrase('mjc_wallet') }}

{$currency.title} ({{ phrase('mjc_available:')}} {$xf.visitor.{$currency.column}|mjc_currency($currency.currency_id)}) {{ phrase('还可以输入10字数。') }} {{ phrase('mjc_anonymous') }}
function setShowLength(obj, maxlength, id) { var rem = maxlength - obj.value.length; var wid = id; if (rem < 0) { rem = 0; } document.getElementById(wid).innerHTML = "还可以输入" + rem + "个字"; }

{{$post.getRedEnvelopeMessage().message}} 信息不公开

.red-packet { color: #fff; padding: 1em; height: 12em; margin: auto; max-width: 9em; overflow: hidden; position: relative; border-radius: 1em; background: #c40b00; } .red-packet header{ top: -2em; left: 0; right: 0; height: 5em; position: absolute; border-radius: 100%; background: #b00b00; } .red-packet main { margin-top: 1em; text-align: center; } h1 { font-size: 1em; margin: 3em 0; position: relative; } .red-packet .avatar.avatar--xxs { position: relative; top: 60px; } .red-packet .avatar.avatar--xxs img { left: 0; right: 0; margin: auto; max-width: 2.2em; position: absolute; border-radius: 100%; border: .1em solid #fff; } .red-packet .author { opacity: .7; top: -40px; position: relative; } .red-packet .open { outline: 0; width: 3em; height: 3em; color: #fff; border: none; display: block; font-size: 1em; cursor: pointer; margin: 1em auto; background: #ffb03a; border-radius: 100%; transition: background .3s, transform .3s; } .red-packet .open:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .red-packet .open:active { background: #eba534; } @keyframes red-packet{ from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } animation: red-packet .75s both cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55);

{{ phrase('打赏') }}:
{$currency.title} ({{ phrase('mjc_available:')}} {$xf.visitor.{$currency.column}|mjc_currency($currency.currency_id)})

1 $(function() { $('.js-presetChange').change(function(e) { var $ctrl = $(this), value = $ctrl.val(), $form = $ctrl.closest('form'); if (value == -1) { return; } $form.find($ctrl.data('start') || 'input[name=start]').val(value); $form.find($ctrl.data('end') || 'input[name=end]').val(''); $form.submit(); }); });
